title: Finance Tracking App
description: A full-featured finance tracking app for personal and business expense management — built solo in under a week with zero coding, using Antigravity no-code platform.
longDescription:
Designed and built a complete finance tracking application from scratch using the Antigravity no-code platform — without writing a single line of code.

The app handles personal and business expense management with real-time analytics, category-based tracking, and clean data visualizations. Built entirely solo in under one week, this project demonstrates the power of combining design thinking with no-code development to ship production-ready apps at startup speed.
highlights: Complete app built solo in under one week
Zero lines of code written — fully no-code
